topic: preserving opened wine by limiting oxygen and heat
trigger_keywords: preservar el vacío en una botella abierta
preservar el vino una vez abierta la botella

steps.label: cause
steps.text: An opened bottle is resealed, oxygen is partly removed or displaced, and the wine is kept cool.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Less oxygen contact and lower temperature slow oxidation and microbial activity.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The remaining wine retains freshness for longer than an open bottle left warm and exposed to air.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The remaining wine retains freshness for longer than an open bottle left warm and exposed to air.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
